steps.title: Identify the tangent ratio
steps.content: Angles $D$ and $E$ are acute, so the right angle is at $F$. For angle $E$, side $DF$ is opposite and side $EF$ is adjacent.

steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
Use tangent as opposite over adjacent:
$$
\tan E=\frac{DF}{EF}
$$
Substitute the given values:
$$
\frac{1}{6}=\frac{18.6}{EF}
$$

steps.title: Solve for the side
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $6EF$: $$ EF=18.6\cdot 6 $$ $$ EF=111.6 $$ The answer is B.
